value.description: SlateRef<double> numeric value to clamp; accepts literal, expression, or $varName.

storeAs.description: SlateRef<string> variable name for the clamped result.

min.description: SlateRef<double?> optional numeric minimum; accepts literal, expression, or $varName.

max.description: SlateRef<double?> optional numeric maximum; accepts literal, expression, or $varName.
